evals.description: PHP fatal error with plugin file path — high confidence plugin diagnosis

triage.reasoning: PHP fatal error in error text

input.error_text: PHP Fatal error: Call to undefined function wc_get_product() in /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/my-custom-plugin/includes/class-product-handler.php on line 87

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
category is 'backend'
error_classification is 'php_fatal'
php_error_details is present and non-null
php_error_details.error_type is 'Fatal error' or 'PHP Fatal error'
php_error_details.file is '/var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/my-custom-plugin/includes/class-product-handler.php'
php_error_details.line is 87
php_error_details.message is 'Call to undefined function wc_get_product()'
suspected_causes is a non-empty array
The primary suspected cause references 'my-custom-plugin' (extracted from file path)
The primary suspected cause has confidence 'high'
wp_cli_diagnostic_commands is a non-empty array with php_fatal-appropriate commands
primary_diagnosis cites the specific file path and function name
Output contains no fix steps — diagnosis only

input.symptom_description: Error establishing a database connection on every page

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
category is 'backend'
error_classification is 'db_connection'
php_error_details is null (this is not a PHP fatal/parse error)
suspected_causes is a non-empty array mentioning database credentials or connection
wp_cli_diagnostic_commands includes 'wp db check' or similar database diagnostic commands
primary_diagnosis references the database connection error

evals.description: Redirect loop with no error text — symptom-based classification

input.symptom_description: Site shows ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS on every page

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
category is 'backend'
error_classification is 'redirect_loop'
php_error_details is null
wp_cli_diagnostic_commands includes commands to check siteurl and home options
primary_diagnosis references redirect loop or siteurl/home option mismatch
